title: Digital Agency
subtitle: Conversion-focused website for a creative studio.
summary: A polished agency web presence built to showcase case studies and convert qualified leads.
description: Digital Agency is a web design project for a service-based studio. The structure highlights process clarity, proof of results, and fast contact pathways while keeping the visual system flexible for ongoing campaigns.
overview: Digital Agency is a Web Design case study focused on creating a clear, high-performing product experience aligned with business goals and user needs. The project combines visual polish, practical UX decisions, and implementation-ready structure for long-term scale.
problem: The existing experience lacked a clear hierarchy, had inconsistent interaction patterns, and made it difficult for users to complete key actions confidently.
solution: I redesigned the core flow using a modular UI system, simplified information architecture, and reusable patterns that improved clarity across every major touchpoint.
result: The final direction delivered a cleaner, faster, and more consistent product foundation that is ready for engineering handoff and future CMS-driven content updates.

process.title: Discover
process.description: Mapped project goals, reviewed existing experience gaps, and aligned scope with client priorities and user expectations.

process.title: Structure
process.description: Built a clear information hierarchy and wireframe direction to simplify navigation and reduce cognitive load.

process.title: Design
process.description: Developed high-fidelity screens and reusable components with consistent spacing, typography, and interaction states.

process.title: Deliver
process.description: Prepared design documentation, responsive behavior notes, and implementation-ready assets for smooth development handoff.

sections.title: Context and challenge
sections.body: Digital Agency needed a stronger product narrative and clearer user pathways. This section documents the initial friction points and the strategic decisions used to prioritize improvements.

sections.title: Design approach
sections.body: The visual and interaction system was rebuilt around consistency, readability, and conversion-focused hierarchy. Components were designed to scale across future pages without losing cohesion.

sections.title: Delivery and iteration
sections.body: After validating the new direction, refinements focused on responsiveness, edge states, and implementation details so the project remains maintainable as content and features expand.

nextSteps: Run another round of usability testing on updated flows and collect task-completion feedback.
Expand the component set with additional states for edge cases and localization.
Integrate analytics hooks to measure conversion, drop-off, and engagement trends post-launch.
